meta.title: MBTI Coffee Test - DopaBrain
meta.description: Find the perfect coffee that matches your MBTI personality type! 8 coffee shop scenario questions reveal your coffee soulmate.

app.title: MBTI Coffee Test
app.subtitle: Find the perfect coffee that matches your personality
app.startDesc: Answer 8 coffee shop scenario questions to discover your MBTI coffee match!

q1.text: You walk into a cafe. How do you order?

0.text: Chat with the barista and ask for recommendations

1.text: Come with friends and pick together loudly

2.text: Pre-order on the app and pick up quietly

3.text: Browse the menu slowly by myself

q2.text: What kind of cafe vibe do you prefer?

0.text: Wooden tables, warm lights — classic cafe

q3.text: What matters most when choosing coffee?

1.text: Value for money — best bang for the buck

0.text: Same time, same coffee, every day

1.text: I plan my cafe visits for the week

2.text: Totally spontaneous — depends on the mood

3.text: Go with the flow, no plans

q5.text: Who do you want to drink coffee with?

0.text: Cafe tour with a group of friends!

1.text: At a meetup with new people

2.text: Alone, in my own quiet time

q6.text: A new menu item just dropped at the cafe!

1.text: Look into the ingredients and origin carefully

2.text: Order it right away! I love trying new things

3.text: If the name and description inspire me, I'll try it

q7.text: Your friend recommends a bad coffee. What do you do?

0.text: Give them an honest taste review

1.text: Analyze and explain why it doesn't taste good

2.text: Say thanks and change the subject

3.text: Drink it together since they like it

q8.text: You discover a cafe while traveling!

0.text: Head to the one I researched beforehand

2.text: Just walk in wherever looks interesting

3.text: Pick the one with good vibes or music

INTJ.name: Espresso
INTJ.description: Like an espresso, you are a powerhouse of concentrated energy. You strip away the unnecessary and keep what matters. One sip — one lasting impression. Espresso is the perfect partner for your solo planning sessions.

ENFP.name: Caramel Macchiato
ENFP.tagline: Sweet, colorful, and full of energy
ENFP.description: Like a caramel macchiato, you blend sweetness and energy effortlessly. With layers of different flavors, you bring a unique charm everywhere you go. This is the coffee for someone who loves new people and new adventures.

ISTJ.name: Americano
ISTJ.description: Like an americano, you are an icon of unwavering reliability. Not flashy, but always there doing what needs to be done. Just like ordering the same coffee every day, your consistency is your greatest strength.

INFP.name: Lavender Latte
INFP.description: Like a lavender latte, you are one of a kind. Your subtle floral essence quietly touches people's hearts, and your rich inner world knows no bounds. This is a coffee as creative and emotional as you are.

ENTP.name: Double-Shot Flat White
ENTP.description: Like a double-shot flat white, you are intense yet refined. You love breaking the mold and shine brightest in debates and brainstorms. This coffee is for those who refuse to be ordinary.

ISFJ.name: Vanilla Latte
ISFJ.description: Like a vanilla latte, you make everyone feel at ease. Sweet and smooth, you quietly take care of those around you. Your subtle sweetness mirrors the gentle warmth of this beloved drink.

ENTJ.name: Cold Brew
ENTJ.description: Like a cold brew, you may seem cool on the outside but burn with intensity within. Slowly steeped over time for deep flavor — your planning and execution are unmatched. This is the coffee of leadership.

INFJ.name: Chai Latte
INFJ.description: Like a chai latte, you are a complex blend of many spices. Soft on the surface but hiding deep insight and passion within. You have a special gift for reading people's hearts.

ESTP.name: Iced Americano
ESTP.description: Like an iced americano, you stay cool in any situation. Just as you'd order iced regardless of season, you live by your own rules without caring what others think. Action and presence are your weapons.

ISFP.name: Matcha Latte
ISFP.description: Like a matcha latte, you possess a natural beauty. With the vivid green color representing your unique aesthetic sense, you quietly build your own world of art and expression.

ESTJ.name: Drip Coffee
ESTJ.tagline: Practical, traditional, and a born leader
ESTJ.description: Like drip coffee, you follow the process precisely while achieving the best results. Systematic and accurate execution is your style. You are the dependable leader — just like the perfect drip.

INTP.name: Turkish Coffee
INTP.description: Like Turkish coffee, you create deep flavor through unconventional methods. Seeing the world through a different lens, you love solving complex puzzles. An analyst who finds meaning even in coffee grounds.

ESFP.name: Frappuccino
ESFP.description: Like a frappuccino, you are colorful and full of joy. With whipped cream and syrup-level charm, you make everyone around you smile. Life is a party — and so is your coffee!

ISTP.name: Long Black
ISTP.description: Like a long black, you focus on the essence without any fluff. You function perfectly on your own and take only what you need. Quiet but strong — that's the long black, that's you.

ESFJ.name: Cappuccino
ESFJ.description: Like a cappuccino, you are a perfect blend of smooth foam and rich coffee. At the center of every gathering, you make everyone comfortable. Your warm words brighten people's days.

ENFJ.name: Mocha
ENFJ.tagline: Passionate, inclusive, and sweet yet strong
ENFJ.description: Like a mocha, you combine the sweetness of chocolate with the intensity of espresso. With warm charisma, you lead people and help everyone shine in their own unique way.
